caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Showers Impact Eastern Caribbean Ports
caribbean.paragraph: San Juan is experiencing moderate northeast winds sustained at 17 knots with wave heights around 3.7 feet and a dominant northerly swell period of 12 seconds. Rain chances reach 67 percent, creating locally heavier showers while Antigua sees lighter winds near 14 knots with similar conditions.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Cadiz Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing steady winds at 20 knots with wave heights reaching 6.2 feet and a dominant west swell period of 9 seconds. Rain probability is at 100 percent, indicating persistent precipitation affecting the port and surrounding coastal areas.
